title: Camp Nou opens
subtitle: Sports stadium
fact: Camp Nou, officially Spotify Camp Nou for sponsorship reasons, and often referred to in English as the Nou Camp, is a stadium in Barcelona and the home of La Liga club FC Barcelona since its opening in 1957.

title: Wembley Stadium opens
subtitle: Sports stadium
fact: Wembley Stadium, currently branded as Wembley Stadium connected by EE for sponsorship reasons, is an association football stadium in Wembley, London, England.

title: Estadio Banorte opens
subtitle: Sports stadium
fact: Estadio Azteca, officially known as Estadio Banorte for sponsorship reasons, is a football stadium located in Coyoacán, Mexico City.

title: Tottenham Hotspur Stadium opens
subtitle: Sports stadium
fact: Tottenham Hotspur Stadium is a multi-purpose stadium in London, England.
